docket_entries.description: JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER VICKI GROSS. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-07-2002 AT 9:20 AM IN DEPT. 303, PERKER L MEEKS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.
